synopsis:
Crimson Reign 5 is the fifth and final issue of the Marvel canon comic book miniseries Star Wars: Crimson Reign.
LADY QI'RA has used every tool at her disposal to generate chaos in the Galactic Empire, all to further her goal of eradicating the Sith. But as the final phase of Qi'ra's grand plan is revealed, she is about to learn a lesson that the Jedi Order also came to understand… Underestimate EMPEROR PALPATINE and pay the price.
title: Crimson Reign #5
